name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 1 Nov 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release consists of a complete UI revamp of the shopping cart integrations supported by Marketing Cloud. Also, in custom SMS campaign reports, you can now include test messages."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Shopping Cart Integrations UI Revamp","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The user interface for the shopping cart integrations supported by Marketing Cloud – "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-1ShoppingCart","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"1ShoppingCart","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-UltraCart","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"UltraCart","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-Nanacast","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Nanacast","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-Shift4Shop","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Shift4Shop","bold":true}]},{"text":", and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-ClickBank","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"ClickBank","bold":true}]},{"text":" – have been revamped as per our current design standards. (Click the links to learn more about each of these integrations)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These integrations can now be created and managed on the Integrations page. In Navigation, select INTEGRATIONS."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/IntegrationsPage.0685g00000BFBkRAAX.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/IntegrationsPage.0685g00000BFBkRAAX.png","name":"Integrations Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2744,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Following a consistent design template, the index pages show all the existing connections and enable you to create new ones and manage existing ones."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's a screenshot of the ClickBank Integration index page:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ClickBankIndexPage.0685g00000BFBjTAAX.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ClickBankIndexPage.0685g00000BFBjTAAX.png","name":"ClickBank Index Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1314,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Besides the user-friendly design, we have simplified the process of adding new connections – requiring minimal steps from your end."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's a screenshot of the Add Integration page for the ClickBank integration:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ClickBankAddIntegration.0685g00000BFBjxAAH.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ClickBankAddIntegration.0685g00000BFBjxAAH.png","name":"ClickBank - Add Integration","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1314,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Custom SMS Report – Include Test Messages","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now specify whether you want to include the test messages in the custom SMS campaign report. A new checkbox – "},{"text":"Include Test Messages","bold":true},{"text":" – has been introduced on step 2 of the Custom SMS Campaign Report page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomSMSReportStep2.0685g00000BFBm3AAH.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomSMSReportStep2.0685g00000BFBm3AAH.png","name":"Custom SMS Report Step 2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1660,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When the "},{"text":"Include Test Messages","bold":true},{"text":" checkbox is selected, the test messages for the selected campaigns are included in the report."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about the custom SMS campaign reports, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Custom-SMS-Campaign-Report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Custom SMS Campaign Reports","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]}]
